inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total principal amount borrowed for education expenses

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fixed annual interest rate on the student loan

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Repayment period in years after any deferment ends

inputs.label: Deferment Period
inputs.businessContext: Number of months before repayment starts, during which interest accrues and capitalizes

formulas.monthlyPayment: effectivePrincipal * monthlyRate * (1 + monthlyRate) ** n / ((1 + monthlyRate) ** n - 1)
